tasks.dependencies: Fetches the Orders entity list (stores/zones/segments/vendors) to fan out over
One mapped instance per entity, bound to a dedicated Airflow pool
Runs in parallel with process_unit, watches shared pool capacity
Fan-in of all mapped instances plus the monitor
Evaluates whether queue congestion impacted this or sibling DAGs

incident.description: Queue Congestion incident on the Orders pipeline (RTL_ORD_QUEUE): returns image-inspection queue congestion.
incident.symptoms: Image-based return-condition inspection tasks, mapped per returned item photo (up to 3,000/day during holiday returns peak), queued for hours behind a fixed-size inference pool.
incident.root_cause: The inference pool was provisioned for average daily volume (~500 items) with no seasonal scaling plan, and holiday-return volume is roughly 6x average, overwhelming fixed capacity.
incident.business_impact: Returns processing backlog grows daily through the holiday return season, delaying refunds to customers beyond the company's published 5-business-day refund SLA, risking customer satisfaction and regulatory scrutiny in some regions.
incident.resolution: Add elastic autoscaling for the inference pool tied to queue depth, with a pre-approved higher ceiling during the declared holiday-return season window.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: The inference pool was provisioned for average daily volume (~500 items) with no seasonal scaling plan, and holiday-return volume is roughly 6x average, overwhelming fixed capacity.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow shows a growing backlog of queued task instances across consecutive DAG runs, not clearing between runs
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog inference_pool.queue_depth trend shows sustained growth (not recovering between runs) through the holiday period
expected_rca.resolution: Add elastic autoscaling for the inference pool tied to queue depth, with a pre-approved higher ceiling during the declared holiday-return season window.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Formalize seasonal capacity plans as versioned entries in the metadata model, reviewed and pre-approved ahead of known peak periods (holiday returns, back-to-school, etc.).
